'''tamata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachrock|beachrock]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachrock|beachrock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tamata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmætæth|tæmætæth]] || [[word:tæmætæj|tæmætæj]] || [[word:tæmætæsh|tæmætæsh]] || [[word:tæmætæ|tæmætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamamatath|tamamatath]] || [[word:tamamataj|tamamataj]] || [[word:tamamatash|tamamatash]] || [[word:tamamata|tamamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamatath|tamatath]] || [[word:tamataj|tamataj]] || [[word:tamatash|tamatash]] || [[word:tamata|tamata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamaftath|tamaftath]] || [[word:tamaftaj|tamaftaj]] || [[word:tamaftash|tamaftash]] || [[word:tamaftaf|tamaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamatatha|tamatatha]] || [[word:tamataja|tamataja]] || [[word:tamatasha|tamatasha]] || [[word:tamataka|tamataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamatath|tamatath]] || [[word:tamataj|tamataj]] || [[word:tamatash|tamatash]] || [[word:tamata|tamata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamatathal|tamatathal]] || [[word:tamatajal|tamatajal]] || [[word:tamatashal|tamatashal]] || [[word:tamatakal|tamatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamatathatha|tamatathatha]] || [[word:tamatajaja|tamatajaja]] || [[word:tamatashasha|tamatashasha]] || [[word:tamataka|tamataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamatathan|tamatathan]] || [[word:tamatajan|tamatajan]] || [[word:tamatashan|tamatashan]] || [[word:tamatakan|tamatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamatathaoro|tamatathaoro]] || [[word:tamatajaoro|tamatajaoro]] || [[word:tamatashaoro|tamatashaoro]] || [[word:tamatakaoro|tamatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
